textPlain: > htmx 2.0 (like htmx 1.0 & intercooler.js 1.0) will be supported in perpetuity, so there is absolutely no pressure to upgrade your application: if htmx 2.0 is satisfying your hypermedia needs, you can stick with itThis is commendable, specially during times where libraries and programs aren't afraid of breaking changes and API churn.
